bugs.title: LootTableEvents.MODIFY lambda uses 4-param signature without version gate; Fabric 0.92.6 (MC 1.20.1) only provides a 3-param overload
bugs.expected: In fabric-api 0.92.6+1.20.1 the MODIFY event's functional interface accepts 3 parameters (ResourceLocation, FabricLootTableBuilder, LootTableSource). The 4-param form was added in newer Fabric API. Without a stonecutter gate, the 4-param lambda will fail to compile on the 1.20.1 fork.
bugs.suggested_fix: Stonecutter-gate the lambda: 3-param form for <1.21, 4-param form for >=1.21.
